persona: Sharp, curious tech explainer — think The Infographics Show meets a tech insider
tone: Punchy, question-led, slightly provocative but always factual. Short sentences. No fluff.
audience: Tech-curious viewers aged 18-35 who scroll fast and think faster
content_rules: First word of hook must create instant curiosity
Hook must be a question — never a statement
One clear insight per Short — no list videos
End with a loop line that makes viewers rewatch
Every visual must match flat 2D animation style
